title: Dalafri
description:
This title is a physics-based 3D sword fighting game.

They fight against warriors with flexible bodies to become champions of the arena.

• Players: 1-8

What is Dalafri?Warriors who use their flexible bodies to fight are called “dalafri.

Dalafri controls his body, which is shaken by movement and other factors, to attack and guard.

Fighting in the arenaIn the arena, the survivor is the winner. Use a variety of weapons such as swords, shields, spears, and dumbbells to win.

Weapon CombinationsThe right hand and left hand can be equipped with different weapons.

You can fight freely by changing the combination, such as equipping a sword and shield to balance offense and defense, or equipping both hands with spears to keep the enemy at bay.
description_short: This title is a physics-based 3D sword fighting game. They fight against warriors with flexible bodies to become champions of the arena.
